recent.title: HAVN x Fermat Weekly
recent.summary: Last recorded weekly sync with HAVN. Tom, Ryan, and Isabel discussed ongoing funnel performance and AI Search trial. Ryan's last day at FERMAT was Dec 20 -- handoff to Mia announced. This was likely one of the final active engagement calls before the brand went silent.
next_steps: Ryan handoff to Mia/Isabel for ongoing account management

recent.title: HAVN x Fermat Weekly
recent.summary: Weekly sync between Tom and Ryan discussing funnel performance and ongoing optimization work.

recent.title: HAVN x Fermat Weekly
recent.summary: Regular weekly sync discussing HAVN funnel performance and strategy.

calls.analysis: HAVN had active weekly calls through December 2025 with Ryan Barry as CSM. Ryan left FERMAT on Dec 20, and Isabel O'Keefe (Head of AM) was introduced as interim contact. Mia was also introduced. Last call was Dec 11 -- no calls recorded in 2026. The brand has gone completely silent on calls for 3.5+ months. Key contact is Tom Guilbert (tom@havnwear.com). HAVN is a churning account with no active FERMAT metrics.

messages.author: Isabel O'Keefe
messages.content: Checked in with Tom: asked if he wanted to keep the weekly sync on the calendar (no reply visible)

messages.author: Tom Guilbert (brand)
messages.content: Reported issue with 50/50 incremental test setup not producing correct split (9 replies in thread, included screenshot)

messages.author: Ryan Barry
messages.content: Farewell message: announced last day at FERMAT, introduced Mia DyBuncio and Isabel O'Keefe as new contacts (2 replies)

messages.author: Ryan Barry
messages.content: Shared AI Search Free Trial info and onboarding steps, offered free 6-month trial

messages.author: Ryan Barry
messages.content: Post-call follow-up: virtual product config for blanket launch, AI visibility report, gift guide funnel examples

slack.analysis: HAVN Slack channel has been essentially dead since January 2026. Isabel checked in on Jan 16 about keeping the weekly sync -- no visible response from Tom. Tom's last engagement was a technical issue on Jan 6 about A/B test splits. Pulkit joined the channel Feb 24 but has not posted any outreach. Ryan Barry (former CSM) was the primary relationship driver before departing Dec 20. The brand appears to have disengaged after the CSM transition and is now churning.

email.analysis: No email communication found in the last 30 days between Pulkit and HAVN. The brand has been completely silent across all communication channels.
